GYM LAUNCH 2.0

IN-GYM LAUNCH
RESOURCES
Optimizing &
Scaling Ads
Guidelines for starting ads on a new account and tips for
scaling your ads up and optimizing them to perform better.
We recommend up to 6 ad sets with a starting budget is $10
per ad set per day. The budget on the ad sets depends on
your market.
A review of your most important and secondary Key
Performance Indicators - Cost Per Lead (CPL), Cost Per
Result (CPR), Click Through Rate (CTR), Impressions (Views),
Cost Per Click (CPC).
How to check ad performance in charts.
Checking your ads - at least twice per day and what to look
for on the first and second checks.
Ad management tips.
